---
title: "Projects"
---

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images\business-people-team-analytics-data-research-web-monitoring-report-dashboard-monitor-concept-finance-investment-graph-r-202761860.webp){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
Project 1
Statistical Tests and Regression using Jamovi

[View Project →](project1.qmd)
:::

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images\quota_sampling.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
Project 3
Confidence Intervals and Sampling Distributions


[View Project →](project3.qmd)
:::

:::

::: {.column width="4%"}
:::

::: {.column width="48%"}

::: {.card style="background:#fff; padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); margin-bottom:25px;"}
![](Images\download.png){style="width:100%; border-radius:6px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
Project 2
Sales Dashboard Analysis using Power BI


[View Project →](project2.qmd)
:::

:::

::::
